36.reason: [alp[cnt].n is set after incrementing cnt, so the new entry's count is initialized but the previous word's count was never set to 1]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [alp[cnt].n is set after incrementing cnt, so the new entry's count is initialized but the previous word's count was never set to 1]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [The newly incremented entry `alp[cnt]` is never initialized properly for its string part; only `.n` is set to 1, but `.a` may contain garbage. Also, after the last word in file (if not followed by non-letter), it won't be null-terminated or counted.]
